name: Loki
subtitle: Full Correspondences
flowText: Loki embodies trickery, change, mischief — under Mercury · Uranus; in Gemini, Aquarius.

related.name: ☿ Mercury
related.teaser: Mercury is the quicksilver axis — trickster of thought, breath of inspiration, messenger between…

related.name: The Morrigan
related.teaser: The Morrigan embodies war, fate, sorcery — under Mars · Saturn; in Scorpio.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: Saraswati
related.teaser: Saraswati embodies wisdom, craft, strategy — under Mercury · Jupiter; in Aquarius, Libra.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Thoth
related.teaser: Thoth embodies wisdom, craft, strategy — under Mercury · Jupiter; in Aquarius, Libra.

related.name: Minerva
related.teaser: Minerva embodies wisdom, craft, strategy — under Mercury · Jupiter; in Aquarius, Libra.

related.name: Indra
related.teaser: Indra embodies storms, thunder, protection — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Perkūnas
related.teaser: Perkūnas embodies storms, thunder, protection — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Perun
related.teaser: Perun embodies storms, thunder, protection — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Raijin
related.teaser: Raijin embodies storms, thunder, protection — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Tsukuyomi
related.teaser: Tsukuyomi embodies moon, hunt, wilderness — under Moon; in Cancer, Sagittarius.
